summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of Ration Shop Queue Management app. All new features working correctly: localStorage persistence, shop operating hours, queue status toggle, admin scroll fix, and skip current button. Backend API 100% success rate (18/18), frontend ~95% success with all critical features functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/shops/{shop_id}/settings returns queue_start_time, queue_end_time, queue_status, queue_reset_version
GET /api/tokens/{id}/status returns new queue status fields
GET /api/shops/{id}/counter returns new operating hours fields
Homepage displays queue status and operating hours when shop selected
Join Queue page shows queue status badge and duplicate token toast
Token Status page shows queue status indicator
Live Counter page shows queue status bar with operating hours
Admin dashboard LIVE/STOPPED toggle button functionality
Admin dashboard operating hours settings (start/end time inputs and save)
Admin dashboard Skip Current button beside Next Token button
Admin dashboard queue table independent scroll behavior
localStorage token persistence and duplicate ration card detection
Token generation redirects to existing token on duplicate
All existing iteration 1 functionality still working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor testing script syntax issues)
